## Summary

## Correctness and atomicity

- [ ] New behavior has tests.
- [ ] Distributed read/modify/write remains atomic.
- [ ] Clock-boundary behavior is tested.
- [ ] Failure mode is documented.

## Quality

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `mypy src/limitforge`
- [ ] `pytest -q --cov=limitforge`
- [ ] Documentation and changelog updated
